Notice Of Motion & Motion To Quash Subpoenas And For Attorney’S Fees And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-16-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ron Maidenberg, Esq. of MAIDENBERG LAW GROUP, T:510.444.3330, for plaintiff/moving party;
Sheila S. Johnson, Esq., CCSF Deputy City Attorney, T:415.554.4230, for defendant/opposing party.

RULING: Defendant's counsel argued the Court's award of sanctions against CCSF. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court modified its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF NOEL CLAY's Motion To Quash Subpoenas And For Attorney's Fees And Monetary Sanctions, reducing the amount of sanctions, as follows:

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to quash subpoenas is denied as moot. Plaintiff is awarded sanctions against the City in the amount of $500.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
